title: leptoloma miliacea
intro: Leptoloma miliacea, also known as Indian dill, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant's leaves and seeds have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leptoloma miliacea include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Leptoloma miliacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
